cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Control in the Criminal Partnership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl begins the story asserting dominance over Grimsrud, but repeated failures to manage crises—especially during traffic stops—lead to Grimsrud's violent interventions, undermining Carl's authority and exposing a growing power struggle.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carl establishes himself as the decision-maker, overriding Grimsrud's needs and redirecting plans.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carl's attempts to prioritize personal comfort (food, sex) are met with resistance, revealing a fractured partnership where Grimsrud no longer defers to his leadership.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The power imbalance remains volatile, with no clear resolution on who controls the escape plan, increasing the risk of fatal conflict.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Complicity and Violence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl transitions from orchestrator of a kidnapping to an active participant in murder and cover-up, marked by increasing exposure and near-discovery during body disposal attempts.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carl attempts to avoid violence during a traffic stop, relying on bribery and deception.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carl is directly involved in concealing a murder, repeatedly exposed to detection while handling a corpse, cementing his role as a killer.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The possibility that witnesses saw Carl during the cover-up looms, threatening imminent arrest.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Psychological Deterioration in Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Trapped in the remote cabin, Carl's mental state unravels, manifesting in cruelty toward Jean and violent outbursts, revealing his dependence on external stimulation and control as coping mechanisms.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carl struggles with sensory deprivation, lashing out at a broken TV in frustration.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The TV briefly turns on, offering ironic, meaningless content that underscores Carl's isolation and psychological disintegration.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Carl's instability continues to escalate, threatening further breakdowns and conflict with Grimsrud.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Collapse of the Ransom Scheme
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl's plan to extract ransom money collapses into chaos: the exchange turns violent, he is critically injured, and though he obtains the money, he buries it in an unmarked, irretrievable location.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carl attempts to force Wade into compliance during the ransom drop, demanding Jerry's presence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carl secures the money but loses it permanently by burying it without a reliable marker, rendering the entire criminal enterprise futile.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The money is effectively lost, and Carl's survival is in doubt, nullifying any potential payoff from the kidnapping.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Law Enforcement Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Though absent from the investigation, Carl becomes increasingly targeted as law enforcement traces the crime vehicle and gathers witness descriptions, steadily closing in on his identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: The triple homicide is under investigation, with footprints and vehicle evidence collected but no suspect identified.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carl is indirectly identified through the tan Ciera and witness accounts from the strip club, placing him under growing investigative scrutiny.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Carl remains unaware of how close the net is, leaving him vulnerable to capture despite his continued evasion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Collapse of Jerry's Financial Redemption
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry's desperate pursuit of financial stability through a legitimate business deal unravels as he is rejected by Wade and Stan, forcing him to resort to a criminal kidnapping scheme. When the plan spirals into violence and the ransom demand escalates, his original goal of solving his financial crisis collapses under the weight of uncontrollable consequences.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry believes he can secure a $750,000 loan to execute a real estate deal and regain control of his finances.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry's financial scheme is destroyed by murder, increased ransom demands, and external scrutiny, leaving him panicked and powerless.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jerry has no viable way to obtain the full $80,000 or escape the legal and moral fallout of the violent crimes now tied to his plan.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Criminal Complicity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry transitions from orchestrating a controlled kidnapping to becoming an active participant in a violent cover-up. His insistence on excluding the police intensifies the danger, and when the plan turns deadly, he shifts from planner to perpetrator by concealing murder evidence, fully entangling himself in the crime.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry asserts control over the ransom process, demanding no police involvement to protect the secrecy of the scheme.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry physically conceals Wade's body and attempts to erase forensic evidence, marking his irreversible descent into criminality.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The presence of additional bodies and forensic traces leaves Jerry vulnerable to exposure despite his efforts to cover up the crime.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Professional and Personal Trust
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry's repeated failures in customer interactions and his growing evasiveness with family and authorities reveal a progressive breakdown in trust. His inability to maintain credibility professionally and emotionally withdraws from his son, culminating in suspicious behavior that draws police attention.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry is already struggling to maintain customer trust, being seen as dishonest after a disputed sale.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry is perceived as deceptive and agitated, prompting law enforcement to identify him as a person of interest, while he emotionally disengages from his son.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jerry's true level of criminal involvement remains ambiguous, but his damaged relationships leave him isolated and under investigation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Illusion of Control and Its Shattering
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry clings to the belief that he can manage both his financial desperation and the kidnapping scheme through careful control. However, each stage reveals his diminishing authority—first losing the deal, then failing to prevent police suspicion, then being blamed by Carl, and finally retreating in denial as the plan collapses around him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry believes he can secure financing and retain control over a high-stakes business deal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry is absent, unaccounted for, and emotionally withdrawn as the criminal operation disintegrates due to his failure to act.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jerry's whereabouts and ultimate accountability remain unknown, leaving his fate and the consequences of his choices unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Rest to Investigation: Marge's Professional Activation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge transitions from domestic rest to active law enforcement duty in response to murder calls, marking her re-entry into official investigative status despite personal circumstances.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Marge is at home, asleep, in a state of personal rest.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marge departs for crime scenes fully in role as sheriff, asserting her professional authority.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The recurring early-morning calls suggest an ongoing threat that may continue to disrupt her personal life.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Unraveling the Vehicle Clue: The DLR Breakthrough
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge corrects a critical misinterpretation of evidence by identifying that 'DLR' refers to dealer plates, redirecting the investigation toward the correct vehicle type.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: The investigation is stalled due to misreading of the trooper's citation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The search is refocused on a tan Ciera with dealer plates, significantly advancing the case.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The vehicle remains unlocated, and the suspects are still at large.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuing the Suspects: From Stripper Club to Identification
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge follows a tenuous lead to a remote stripper club, where she extracts key suspect descriptions, overcoming resistance and ambiguity to gain actionable intelligence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: The suspects' identities and whereabouts are completely unknown.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marge obtains distinctive physical and behavioral traits of the two suspects, including their direction toward the Twin Cities.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The descriptions are subjective and may not lead directly to arrest without corroboration.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Balancing Duty and Domesticity: Marge's Emotional Anchors
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Throughout the investigation, Marge maintains emotional equilibrium through regular contact with her husband Norm, grounding herself in their loving relationship despite professional strain and pregnancy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Marge is emotionally centered but beginning to feel the weight of her duties.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She remains committed to both her marriage and her job, demonstrating resilience and balance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The physical and emotional toll of her pregnancy and workload may eventually challenge this equilibrium.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Closing In on Jerry: Suspicion to Pursuit
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge's interview with Jerry Lundegaard reveals his guilt through evasive behavior and flight, transforming him from a person of interest into a prime suspect.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry is a potential source of information about a missing dealership vehicle.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry's explosive reaction and escape confirm his involvement, prompting Marge to escalate the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jerry's exact role in the crime and whether he will be apprehended remain unresolved.
